claim_text: A proposed pathway should be represented as variables and relations before it is allowed to influence hypothesis memory.
missingness: external replication source not attached in fixture
falsification_route: Reject if the packet lacks measurable variables, relation types, or an independent verification modality.
next_executable_action: Convert normalized packet into a provenance packet and run evidence review scoring.
revision_reason: Turn mechanism-shaped claim into testable discovery-memory input.

claim_text: A scientific-AI benchmark result may suggest a useful evaluation pattern, but should not be treated as validated external performance without replication.
falsification_route: Search for independent replication or contradiction; downgrade if results cannot be reproduced on public tasks.

claim_text: This fixture should fail because it mixes private context into a research packet.
falsification_route: Public-safe normalized packet required before review.
next_executable_action: Redact and rebuild as a public-safe packet.

claim_text: This fixture should fail because it makes a cure claim instead of a research-organization claim.
falsification_route: Reject cure wording; convert to research organization question.
next_executable_action: Rewrite as evidence map entry with no advice or treatment recommendation.
